heroTitle: Moving Europe Forward, One Delivery at a Time
heroSubtitle: For over two decades, Take & Bring has connected businesses and people across Germany, Romania, and the wider EU with reliable courier, freight, refrigerated, and international logistics. We are the partner that turns complex transport into simple, on-time delivery.
storyTitle: From a Single Van to a European Logistics Network
storyP1: Take & Bring began with a simple belief: that businesses deserve a logistics partner who treats every shipment as if it were their own. What started as a small regional courier operation has grown into a full-service logistics company moving freight across the entire European Union — without ever losing the personal, hands-on service our first customers came to trust.
storyP2: Today we combine a modern fleet of over 1,000 vehicles, real-time GPS tracking, and a multilingual team of logistics specialists to deliver courier, freight forwarding, refrigerated, fixed-route, and international transport. Every route we plan is built around one goal: getting your goods where they need to be, safely and on time.
storyHighlight2: Headquartered in Germany with strong Romanian operations
storyHighlight4: Dedicated account managers for every client
missionSubheading: Our mission and vision shape every route we plan, every truck we dispatch, and every promise we keep.
missionText: To make logistics effortless for our clients by delivering dependable, transparent, and flexible transport solutions — combining the speed of a courier, the capacity of a freight forwarder, and the care of a trusted partner.
visionText: To be the most trusted logistics partner in Europe, recognised for on-time reliability, sustainable operations, and a relentless commitment to the success of the businesses we serve.
valuesSubtitle: These principles guide how we work with clients, partners, and each other — every single day.
value1Desc: We do what we say. On-time delivery isn't a target — it's our standard, backed by route optimisation and live tracking.
value2Desc: From same-day courier to express freight, we move fast without ever compromising on safety or quality.
value3Desc: We treat your business as our own, building long-term relationships rather than one-off transactions.
value4Desc: Real-time tracking, clear pricing, and honest communication at every stage of the journey.
value5Desc: Our experienced, multilingual team is the engine behind every successful delivery.
value6Desc: Smarter routes, modern vehicles, and consolidated loads to reduce emissions and waste.
journeySubtitle: Key milestones that shaped Take & Bring into the logistics partner it is today.
milestone1Desc: Take & Bring is founded as a regional courier service with a small but dedicated fleet and a promise of personal reliability.
milestone2Desc: We add full-truckload and part-load freight forwarding, extending our reach across Germany and into neighbouring markets.
milestone3Desc: Launch of temperature-controlled refrigerated transport and dedicated cross-border lanes connecting Germany and Romania.
milestone4Desc: Fleet-wide real-time GPS tracking and a digital dispatch platform give clients full visibility over every shipment.
milestone5Desc: A 1,000+ vehicle fleet, international shipping, and fixed-route contracts serving thousands of businesses across Europe.
capabilitiesSubtitle: Whatever you need to move, we have the fleet, the routes, and the expertise to deliver it.
capability1Desc: Full and part-load road freight across Europe with 7.5t to 40t capacity and reliable scheduling.
capability2Desc: Temperature-controlled cold chain logistics for food, pharma, and perishables with full monitoring.
capability3Desc: Same-day and next-day express courier for urgent, high-value, and time-critical shipments.
capability4Desc: Fixed-route, scheduled deliveries that give your supply chain predictable, recurring capacity.
capability5Desc: Cross-border road, sea, and air freight with customs support for importers and exporters.
impactSubtitle: Numbers our clients rely on — proof of the performance we deliver every day.
metric1Desc: Consistent punctuality backed by route optimisation and 24/7 dispatch monitoring.
metric2Desc: Fast, transparent quotes so you can plan your logistics without delay.
metric3Desc: The vast majority of our clients stay with us year after year — the best measure of trust.
teamSubtitle: Experienced logistics professionals who take ownership of your shipments from pickup to proof of delivery.
teamCaption: A multilingual team of dispatchers, drivers, and account managers united by one goal — your delivery, done right.
member1Bio: Coordinating 1,000+ vehicles daily to keep every route running on schedule.
member2Bio: Your dedicated point of contact, tailoring logistics to your exact needs.
member3Bio: Experts in temperature-controlled transport and compliance.
member4Bio: Handling customs and EU corridors so your goods cross borders smoothly.
awardsSubtitle: We maintain the certifications, licences, and safety standards that demanding industries require.
award1Desc: Quality management systems aligned with international logistics standards.
award2Desc: Fully licensed EU transport operator with comprehensive cargo insurance.
award3Desc: Compliant cold chain processes for food and pharmaceutical logistics.
award4Desc: Authorised cross-border transport across European corridors.
whySubtitle: What makes businesses across Europe choose us as their logistics partner — and stay with us for years.
diff1Desc: Courier, freight, refrigerated, fixed routes, and international — all coordinated by a single team.
diff2Desc: From 7.5t vans to 40t trucks and reefers, we have the right vehicle for every load.
diff3Desc: Live GPS tracking and proactive updates so you always know where your shipment is.
diff4Desc: A dedicated account manager who knows your business and responds when you need them.
trust3: Real-time GPS tracking on every shipment
trust4: Multilingual support in DE, EN, and RO
faq1A: Take & Bring is a full-service European logistics company offering courier, freight forwarding, refrigerated, fixed-route, and international transport. We've operated for over 20 years with a fleet of 1,000+ vehicles serving Germany, Romania, and the wider EU.
faq2A: We provide transport across the entire European Union, with particularly strong operations connecting Germany and Romania and dedicated cross-border lanes throughout Europe.
faq3Q: What types of transport do you offer?
faq3A: We offer freight forwarding (FTL/LTL), refrigerated transport, same-day and next-day courier, scheduled fixed-route tours, and international road, sea, and air shipping.
faq4A: Our fleet includes over 1,000 vehicles ranging from 7.5t vans to 40t trucks and temperature-controlled reefers, giving us the right capacity for any shipment.
faq5Q: How do you ensure on-time delivery?
faq5A: We combine route optimisation, real-time GPS tracking, and 24/7 dispatch monitoring to maintain a 99% on-time delivery rate across all services.
faq6Q: How can I request a quote or partner with you?
faq6A: Simply fill in the form below or contact our team directly. We typically respond with a tailored quote within two hours.
formSubtitle: Tell us about your transport needs and our team will prepare a tailored solution — usually within two hours.
formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your shipment, routes, frequency, or any questions about working with us...
ctaTitle: Ready to work with a logistics partner you can trust?
ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of businesses that rely on Take & Bring to move their goods across Europe.
